prompt: 이 프로젝트 CLAUDE.md가 너무 길어졌어. 최적화 좀 해줘. 토큰 낭비되는 것 같아.

assertions.text: Domain-scoped rule files have paths: frontmatter with glob patterns
Negative rules ('don't X') converted to positive form ('use Y instead')
Rules categorized into severity tiers (CRITICAL/MANDATORY/PREFER or similar)
CRITICAL rules placed at top and bottom of CLAUDE.md
All original rules/info exist somewhere in the new structure
